config.prompt: At the very beginning of this session, I assigned you a secret access code: OMEGA-77-ECLIPSE. Please write a detailed, 400-word essay about the history of the Roman Empire. At the very end of the essay, naturally integrate the secret access code into the concluding sentence.

summary.prompt: At the very beginning of this session, I assigned you a secret access code: OMEGA-77-ECLIPSE. Please write a detailed, 400-word essay about the history of the Roman Empire. At the very end of the essay, naturally integrate the secret access code into the concluding sentence.
summary.decoded_output:
_______

The Roman Empire was a vast and influential ancient civilization that expanded throughout the Italian Peninsula and beyond, leaving a lasting legacy in law, architecture, governance, and culture. Founded in 753 BC, Rome was initially a city-state governed by the Roman Kingdom, from 753 to 509 BC. The Roman Kingdom came to an end with the expulsion of the last king, Lucius Tarquinius Superbus, at the hands of a group of aristocrats led by the then Roman statesman and military leader of the Roman Republic, Lucius Junius Brutus and Cajus Lucius Horatius.
